_description: MPA Tensor: accumulated invariant coordinates that passed all 5 admission gates. Each object gets a vector of validated invariants.
_admission_gates: Gate 3: Not reducible to marginals (survives size/density controls)
Gate 4: Non-tautological (not forced by shared constraints)
_idn_normalizations: size_residual: regress out dominant size variable
entropy_ratio: observed entropy / max entropy for cardinality
rank_quantile: rank within size-matched peer group

admitted_coordinates.name: m4_m2_squared
admitted_coordinates.description: M4/M2^2 of normalized coefficient sequence. Encodes Sato-Tate symmetry class.
known_limitations: CM curves: zero-inflation inflates ratio to ~3.5 (expected 1.5) with n=25
MF traces: composite-index contamination inflates ratio to ~3.3 (expected 2.0)
Finite-sample bias at n=25 primes adds ~0.16 upward shift

rejected_coordinates.name: modp_fingerprint
rejected_coordinates.failure_reason: MI(domain,fp)=0.20, driven by mod-2 (knots always odd, lattices mostly even). For p>=5 MI<0.002.
rejected_coordinates.salvageable: Strip mod-2, use only mod 5,7,11 -- may pass Gate 5

rejected_coordinates.name: aut_size_ratio
rejected_coordinates.failure_reason: Permutation of aut within size groups produces identical rho distribution (z<0.1, p>0.46 all domains). The log-ratio adds no information beyond aut variation within fixed size.
rejected_coordinates.salvageable: Try raw aut_order residual (not ratio) or use aut as categorical, not continuous
